assertions.text: Both a before and after screenshot exist for the affected dashboard
assertions.evidence: before-overview.png (204194 bytes) and after-overview.png (204194 bytes) both exist in outputs/

assertions.text: The screenshot file names distinguish before from after
assertions.evidence: Files named with before- and after- prefixes: before-overview.png, after-overview.png

assertions.text: Screenshots are taken from Grafana with panels fully loaded
assertions.evidence: Playwright MCP snapshot confirmed all panels rendered: overview showed '5.0 deploys/wk', '1.7 weeks', '10.0%', '6.6 days', '14 seats', '31.9%', '69.3%', '23371 lines'
